title: Enforcement actions
doc_html:
§2709.  Enforcement actions

The attorney general or the district attorney in whose district a violation of this Chapter occurred may bring an action in a court of competent jurisdiction to enforce the provisions of this Chapter.

Acts 2001, No. 1164, §1.
doc_text:
§2709.  Enforcement actions
The attorney general or the district attorney in whose district a violation of this Chapter occurred may bring an action in a court of competent jurisdiction to enforce the provisions of this Chapter.
Acts 2001, No. 1164, §1.
